productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men Striped White T-shirt
description: Composition White, black and grey striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two button chest placket, embroidered brand logo on the left chest, and a vented hem Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash with similar colours at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Comfortable, casual dressing at it's most sophisticated, this T-shirt from classic polo guarantees effortless style whatever the occasion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans or chinos and casual shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
